contract_summary: A get-wrapper that unconditionally increments the reference count (qp_refcnt) of the c4iw_qp associated with the given ib_qp. The caller must eventually call a corresponding put (e.g., c4iw_qp_rem_ref) to release the reference. The function does not return the object pointer itself; it expects the caller already holds a valid pointer. This operation is safe and always succeeds.
